Actions.use_case: Full management of managed disks attached to the Rubrik cluster VMs (create, read, update, delete, snapshot access).

List compute SKUs available in the target region when sizing Rubrik cluster nodes.
Full management of disk snapshots used by the Rubrik cluster (create, read, delete, SAS access).
Delete Rubrik cluster VMs during scale-down, replacement, or teardown.

Restart Rubrik cluster VMs during upgrade or recovery operations.

Place Rubrik cluster network interfaces into an existing subnet.
Validate names for Rubrik cluster resources before creation.

Read properties of storage accounts used as the Rubrik cluster backing store.

Required for accessing container for CCES. CCES needs storage container key during bootstrap.
Read user-assigned managed identity properties before attaching them to Rubrik cluster VMs.
